# seerr_notification_agent (Data Source)

Read Seerr notification agent settings via /api/v1/settings/notifications/{agent}.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `agent` (String) Notification agent name (e.g. `email`, `discord`, `slack`).

### Read-Only

- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON response body.
- `status_code` (Number) HTTP status code.
